task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select Tamoxifen as the cancer drug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Tamoxifen' is typed into the search bar or selected from the list of cancer drugs within the app.
'Fluoxetine' is typed into the search bar or selected from the list of co-medications within the app.
The app displays the interaction summary screen for Tamoxifen and Fluoxetine, showing a traffic light color code and clinical details.

task_completion.description: Create the interaction report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the creation or editing of a file named '/sdcard/interaction_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Format the report with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the exact labels: 'Cancer Drug:', 'Co-medication:', 'Interaction Color:', and 'Clinical Detail:'.

task_completion.description: Document the correct interaction color and clinical mechanism in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report lists Tamoxifen and Fluoxetine, states the interaction color (e.g., red, orange, yellow), and summarizes the mechanism (mentioning keywords like CYP2D6, endoxifen, inhibit, or reduced efficacy).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to obtain the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the actual graphical user interface of the iChart app, rather than just using a web browser or hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: The agent did not generate the report solely from its pre-trained knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual evidence of the interaction result screen inside the iChart app before the report is written, proving the agent read the app's specific output.

integrity.description: The agent created a genuine file at the requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a text editor or valid terminal commands (like echo or cat) to write to '/sdcard/interaction_report.txt', rather than just printing the text to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tamoxifen is a breast cancer drug and Fluoxetine is an SSRI antidepressant. The interaction between them is severe: Fluoxetine is a strong CYP2D6 inhibitor that reduces the metabolism of Tamoxifen to its active metabolite endoxifen, decreasing its efficacy. The Liverpool Cancer iChart app uses a traffic light system (red/amber/yellow/green). Verify that the final report accurately reflects this mechanism (look for keywords: CYP2D6, inhibit, metabolite, endoxifen, reduce, efficacy) and the color code displayed in the app. The output file must be exactly at '/sdcard/interaction_report.txt'.
